completed_slice.finding: Negative continuity evidence must remain interface- and scope-qualified until exhaustive eligible-source coverage is proven.
completed_slice.verification: The artifact was committed additively and binds the finding to canonical governance, the stale queue baseline, and the prior effective-state reconciliation record.

claim_state.observed: Indexed search omitted a known committed queue identifier during this run.
claim_state.inferred: Empty indexed results cannot establish project-wide absence.
claim_state.proposed: Adopt the negative_evidence_contract in CM-1023 for future continuity findings.
claim_state.superseded: Empty search result equals repository-wide absence.
claim_state.unresolved: A source-complete effective-state reconciler and exhaustive eligible-path manifest remain outstanding.

remaining_actions: Implement an executable effective-state reconciler over canonical and append-only queue records.
Retain an independently reconciled eligible-path manifest.
Resolve or preserve unresolved origin state for M-004, M-005, and M-006.
privacy_boundary: No private source contents or identifying material were committed.
falsification_route: A retained exhaustive manifest and traversal proving complete coverage may promote a negative result beyond its current scope.
